title: Map existing pilot evidence preview surface
prompt: Inspect PilotReadinessPage, pilotEvidenceRegisterPreview, and current tests to identify the smallest data model extension.
summary: Mapped existing pilot register preview and /pilot-readiness surface; existing preview had hard-gate rows but no compact readiness dashboard.

title: Design dashboard summary contract
prompt: Define route-visible cards/table for lane coverage, reviewer status, confidence delta, fast artifact loop, retained hash, and commercial signal with explicit no-confidence-movement boundary.
summary: Designed browser-local readiness contract for lane coverage, reviewer status, confidence delta, fast artifact loop, retained hashes, and commercial signal with explicit no-confidence-movement boundary.

title: Implement buyer evidence readiness dashboard
prompt: Extend preview data and /pilot-readiness UI using existing patterns; keep browser-local and redacted-register only.
summary: Implemented preview-derived readiness metrics, lane table, dashboard cards, stricter reviewer-status warning behavior, and mobile overflow containment on the pilot-readiness route.

title: Verify dashboard and gates
prompt: Run unit, focused Playwright, visual smoke, and release readiness; challenge overclaim and layout risks.
summary: Verified diff whitespace, TypeScript, focused unit, focused Playwright, Node REPL visual smoke at desktop and 390px CSS viewport, and full release readiness.
evidence: git diff --check; pnpm exec tsc -b --pretty false; vitest pilotEvidenceRegisterPreview; test:wedge-prototype-routes; Node REPL Playwright screenshot; pnpm run check:release-readiness
